# 🎧 Audio (153)

Clone a voice from a few seconds, score a track from a hum, or pull vocals clean out of a finished mix. Sound has become fully programmable, and these repos hold the keys.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## Speech

Natural text-to-speech and speech synthesis that sound human, not robotic

<details>
<summary>Show 64 repos</summary>

- [microsoft/VibeVoice](https://github.com/microsoft/VibeVoice) — ⭐ 47,480 · `Python` · Library — VibeVoice is an open-source, frontier voice AI model from Microsoft that runs locally, supporting over 50 languages for generating long-form, multi-speaker audio with real-time streaming capabilities.
- [coqui-ai/TTS](https://github.com/coqui-ai/TTS) — ⭐ 45,438 · `Python` · Library — This is a deep learning toolkit for Text-to-Speech (TTS) and voice cloning, designed for both research and production environments. It provides various models and utilities for synthesizing speech and converting voices.
- [2noise/ChatTTS](https://github.com/2noise/ChatTTS) — ⭐ 39,363 · `Python` · Library — ChatTTS is a generative speech model designed to produce natural-sounding and expressive dialogue for everyday conversations. It focuses on generating speech suitable for interactive chat applications and conversational AI.
- [suno-ai/bark](https://github.com/suno-ai/bark) — ⭐ 39,140 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Library — Bark is a powerful text-prompted generative audio model capable of creating realistic and diverse speech, music, and sound effects. It allows users to generate audio simply from text inputs.
- [fishaudio/fish-speech](https://github.com/fishaudio/fish-speech) — ⭐ 30,169 · `Python` · Library — Fish Speech is an open-source, state-of-the-art Text-to-Speech (TTS) project that generates highly natural-sounding speech from text. It supports emotion control and multiple languages, operating entirely locally and offline.
- [OpenBMB/VoxCPM](https://github.com/OpenBMB/VoxCPM) — ⭐ 17,644 · `Python` · Model Weights — VoxCPM2 is a tokenizer-free Text-to-Speech (TTS) model designed for generating multilingual speech, enabling creative voice design, and performing true-to-life voice cloning. It focuses on advanced speech synthesis capabilities.
- [SWivid/F5-TTS](https://github.com/SWivid/F5-TTS) — ⭐ 14,452 · `Python` · Paper Code — Official code for F5-TTS, a model designed for high-quality text-to-speech synthesis using a flow matching approach. It generates fluent and faithful speech from text.
- [KittenML/KittenTTS](https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS) — ⭐ 14,100 · `Python` · Library — KittenTTS is a state-of-the-art, ultra-lightweight Text-to-Speech (TTS) model designed to run efficiently on CPUs, even without a GPU, with a small footprint under 25MB.
- [snakers4/silero-vad](https://github.com/snakers4/silero-vad) — ⭐ 9,119 · `Python` · Library — This repository provides Silero VAD, an enterprise-grade pre-trained Voice Activity Detector designed for efficient and accurate voice activity detection, often running in under 1ms.
- [moonshine-ai/moonshine](https://github.com/moonshine-ai/moonshine) — ⭐ 8,444 · `C` · Library — A low-latency, on-device speech-to-text, intent recognition, and text-to-speech library designed for building real-time voice agents and interfaces without relying on cloud services. It offers faster response times and higher accuracy than comparable models like Whisper.
- [Blaizzy/mlx-audio](https://github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-audio) — ⭐ 6,988 · `Python` · Library — mlx-audio is a library for text-to-speech (TTS), speech-to-text (STT), and speech-to-speech (STS) tasks, optimized for Apple Silicon using the MLX framework. It provides efficient speech analysis, including various TTS models, voice cloning, and vocal source separation across multiple languages.
- [santinic/audiblez](https://github.com/santinic/audiblez) — ⭐ 6,383 · `Python` · Application — Audiblez is an open-source application that converts e-books, specifically EPUB files, into high-quality audiobooks. It utilizes the Kokoro voice model for natural-sounding speech and features a user-friendly graphical interface supporting multiple languages.
- [neuphonic/neutts](https://github.com/neuphonic/neutts) — ⭐ 5,842 · `Python` · Library — This repository contains an on-device text-to-speech (TTS) model developed by Neuphonic, which features instant voice cloning capabilities.
- [huggingface/speech-to-speech](https://github.com/huggingface/speech-to-speech) — ⭐ 4,764 · `Python` · Library — This Hugging Face repository provides tools and open-source models for building local, real-time voice agents. It supports speech-to-speech capabilities, including speech synthesis, speech-to-text, and speech translation, enabling the creation of interactive voice applications.
- [MoonshotAI/Kimi-Audio](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/Kimi-Audio) — ⭐ 4,602 · `Python` · Model Weights — Kimi-Audio is an open-source audio foundation model that specializes in understanding, generating, and conversing using audio. It was trained on a large dataset combining audio and text data.
- [denizsafak/abogen](https://github.com/denizsafak/abogen) — ⭐ 4,404 · `Python` · Application — This project generates high-quality audiobooks from various text formats like EPUBs, PDFs, and plain text. It uses the Kokoro speech model for natural-sounding audio and automatically produces synchronized captions.
- [kyutai-labs/pocket-tts](https://github.com/kyutai-labs/pocket-tts) — ⭐ 4,208 · `Python` · Library — Pocket-TTS is a lightweight Text-to-Speech (TTS) system designed for efficient CPU operation. It converts text input into spoken audio output, making advanced speech synthesis accessible for various applications.
- [KoljaB/RealtimeVoiceChat](https://github.com/KoljaB/RealtimeVoiceChat) — ⭐ 3,653 · `Python` · Application — This project enables natural, real-time spoken conversations with AI, specifically LLMs, allowing users to engage in interactive voice chat.
- [supertone-inc/supertonic](https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic) — ⭐ 3,631 · `Swift` · Library — Supertonic is a lightning-fast, on-device, and multilingual text-to-speech (TTS) system. It runs natively via ONNX, providing efficient audio generation for various applications.
- [dograh-hq/dograh](https://github.com/dograh-hq/dograh) — ⭐ 2,715 · `Python` · Agent Framework — Dograh is an open-source, self-hosted platform for building and deploying voice agents, such as conversational AI customer service bots, with decoupled and interchangeable LLM, TTS, and STT components.
- [OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS](https://github.com/OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS) — ⭐ 1,872 · `Python` · Library — MOSS-TTS Family is an open-source speech and sound generation model family designed for high-fidelity, high-expressiveness, and complex real-world scenarios, including stable long-form speech, multi-speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real-time streaming text-to-speech.
- [flybirdxx/ComfyUI-Qwen-TTS](https://github.com/flybirdxx/ComfyUI-Qwen-TTS) — ⭐ 1,462 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — A straightforward implementation of the Qwen3-TTS (Text-to-Speech) model, integrated into ComfyUI to add text-to-speech capabilities to workflows.
- [nari-labs/dia2](https://github.com/nari-labs/dia2) — ⭐ 1,129 · `Python` · Model Weights — This is a Text-to-Speech (TTS) model capable of generating conversational audio in real-time. It focuses on streaming capabilities, allowing speech generation from partial sentences.
- [phuc-nt/my-translator](https://github.com/phuc-nt/my-translator) — ⭐ 1,036 · `JavaScript` · Application — A real-time speech translation application for macOS and Windows, offering free text-to-speech and immediate spoken language translation using user-provided API keys.
- [andimarafioti/faster-qwen3-tts](https://github.com/andimarafioti/faster-qwen3-tts) — ⭐ 995 · `Python` · Library — This repository provides tools for real-time text-to-speech generation using the Qwen3-TTS model, focusing on efficient implementation without relying on vLLM or Triton.
- [soniqo/speech-swift](https://github.com/soniqo/speech-swift) — ⭐ 756 · `Swift` · Library — This is an AI speech toolkit for Apple Silicon devices, providing functionalities like automatic speech recognition (ASR), text-to-speech (TTS), speech-to-speech conversion, voice activity detection, and speaker diarization. It leverages MLX and CoreML for on-device processing on macOS and iOS.
- [Blaizzy/mlx-audio-swift](https://github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-audio-swift) — ⭐ 668 · `Swift` · Library — This is a modular Swift SDK for audio processing on Apple Silicon, enabling on-device, real-time speech-to-text (STT) and text-to-speech (TTS) functionality without relying on cloud APIs.
- [rapidaai/voice-ai](https://github.com/rapidaai/voice-ai) — ⭐ 668 · `Go` · Agent Framework — An open-source, end-to-end orchestration platform for creating real-time conversational voice AI agents, featuring audio streaming, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, voice activity detection, and multi-channel integration.
- [Aratako/Irodori-TTS](https://github.com/Aratako/Irodori-TTS) — ⭐ 656 · `Python` · Library — Irodori-TTS is a text-to-speech (TTS) model that synthesizes speech using flow matching and diffusion models. It uniquely allows control over the generated voice style using emojis.
- [fluxions-ai/vui](https://github.com/fluxions-ai/vui) — ⭐ 652 · `Python` · Framework — VUI is a real-time voice assistant framework featuring WebRTC streaming, local ASR (faster-whisper), and a small TTS model (Vui Nano). It supports voice cloning and barge-in, and is compatible with the OpenAI Realtime API.
- [xiaochong/hi-kid](https://github.com/xiaochong/hi-kid) — ⭐ 628 · `TypeScript` · Application — HiKid is a desktop AI English tutor application designed for children to practice English speaking and listening skills. It offers interactive voice chats and engaging word games, providing an offline and accessible learning environment.
- [salute-developers/GigaAM](https://github.com/salute-developers/GigaAM) — ⭐ 590 · `Python` · Library — A foundational model for speech recognition and emotion recognition tasks, specifically designed for the Russian language.
- [JarodMica/audiobook\_maker](https://github.com/JarodMica/audiobook_maker) — ⭐ 532 · `Python` · CLI Tool — This Python tool generates audiobooks by converting text to speech, utilizing open-source Text-to-Speech (TTS) and voice cloning technologies.
- [prakharsr/audiobook-creator](https://github.com/prakharsr/audiobook-creator) — ⭐ 486 · `Python` · Application — This application converts text-based books (EPUB, PDF, TXT) into fully voiced audiobooks. It uses LLMs and TTS services to generate engaging, multi-voice audiobooks with intelligent character voice attribution and customizable narration.
- [tronghieuit/tiny-tts](https://github.com/tronghieuit/tiny-tts) — ⭐ 392 · `Python` · Library — A small, efficient English Text-to-Speech (TTS) model designed to run with minimal parameters (around 1.6 million), making it suitable for resource-constrained environments.
- [izwi-ai/izwi](https://github.com/izwi-ai/izwi) — ⭐ 325 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — This is a local-first voice AI runtime providing transcription, speaker diarization, text-to-speech (TTS), and voice cloning capabilities. It offers an OpenAI-compatible API for easy integration.
- [pipecat-ai/voice-ui-kit](https://github.com/pipecat-ai/voice-ui-kit) — ⭐ 316 · `TypeScript` · Library — A React UI kit providing components, hooks, and template applications to quickly build voice AI applications. It is designed to support and accelerate Pipecat AI development.
- [elevenlabs/skills](https://github.com/elevenlabs/skills) — ⭐ 232 · `Python` · Skill Pack — This repository offers a collection of pre-built skills for developers to integrate ElevenLabs' AI services into their applications, focusing on Text-to-Speech (TTS), Speech-to-Text (STT), and sound effects for AI agents.
- [ekwek1/soprano-factory](https://github.com/ekwek1/soprano-factory) — ⭐ 224 · `Python` · Library — Soprano-Factory is a repository for training high-speed text-to-speech (TTS) models, capable of generating speech 2000 times faster than real-time. It allows users to create their own custom models for efficient text-to-spoken audio conversion.
- [second-state/qwen3\_tts\_rs](https://github.com/second-state/qwen3_tts_rs) — ⭐ 219 · `Rust` · Library — This repository provides a Rust implementation for performing inference with the Qwen3 Text-to-Speech (TTS) model. It aims to enable Qwen3-TTS functionality.
- [malpern/VoxClaw](https://github.com/malpern/VoxClaw) — ⭐ 181 · `Swift` · Application — VoxClaw is a macOS client that provides Text-to-Speech (TTS) capabilities for OpenClaw agents. It allows these agents to speak from any Mac on the network, integrating voice output into their operations.
- [Monkiia/HaloVoice](https://github.com/Monkiia/HaloVoice) — ⭐ 172 · Application — HaloVoice provides real-time voice translation across more than 30 languages with ultra-low latency, designed for interactive applications like gaming, online meetings, and live streaming.
- [phombal/voicebun](https://github.com/phombal/voicebun) — ⭐ 114 · `Python` · Application — This open-source tool allows users to easily build voice agents using natural language descriptions. It simplifies the creation of interactive voice applications and was recognized as a top product on Product Hunt.
- [ttsds/ttsds](https://github.com/ttsds/ttsds) — ⭐ 87 · `Python` · Library — TTSDS is a benchmark designed to evaluate the quality of synthetic speech by assessing factors like prosody, speaker identity, and intelligibility. It compares synthetic speech against real speech and noisy datasets to provide a comprehensive evaluation.
- [localai-org/LocalVQE](https://github.com/localai-org/LocalVQE) — ⭐ 83 · `C++` · Library — LocalVQE is a lean neural network solution for real-time acoustic echo cancellation, incorporating soft delay estimation. It supports GGML and PyTorch for inference.
- [gradium-ai/gradbot](https://github.com/gradium-ai/gradbot) — ⭐ 79 · `Rust` · Agent Framework — An open-source framework for building and prototyping voice agents, utilizing Gradium APIs.
- [rishiskhare/parrot](https://github.com/rishiskhare/parrot) — ⭐ 74 · `Rust` · Application — Parrot is a free, offline, and private desktop application built with Rust that converts text into speech. It supports multiple languages and focuses on accessibility.
- [fikrikarim/volocal](https://github.com/fikrikarim/volocal) — ⭐ 71 · `Swift` · Application — A fully local voice AI application for iOS devices, enabling real-time conversational AI. It leverages on-device processing for speech-to-text and text-to-speech, providing a private voice assistant experience.
- [Zyphra/ZONOS2](https://github.com/Zyphra/ZONOS2) — ⭐ 64 · `Python` · Library — Zonos2 is an open-weight, real-time Text-to-Speech (TTS) Mixture-of-Experts model offering high-fidelity voice cloning. It supports 33 languages and provides native 44.1kHz output, with Apache 2.0 license for commercial use.
- [distil-labs/distil-voice-assistant-banking](https://github.com/distil-labs/distil-voice-assistant-banking) — ⭐ 57 · `Python` · Application — A local voice assistant specifically tailored for banking tasks, designed as an open-source demonstration with a focus on replacing large LLMs with smaller, more efficient SLMs.
- [gyj1201/zipEnhancer](https://github.com/gyj1201/zipEnhancer) — ⭐ 54 · `Python` · Self-hosted Service — This project extracts the ZipEnhancer noise reduction model from ModelScope, reimplements its inference with pure PyTorch, and packages it as a high-performance FastAPI service for batch audio denoising. It optimizes performance with FP16 and handles long audio files efficiently.
- [acidoom/OpenClaw-app](https://github.com/acidoom/OpenClaw-app) — ⭐ 52 · `Swift` · Application — This is an iOS application designed to facilitate real-time voice conversations with a personal AI assistant called OpenClaw.
- [Berkeley-Speech-Group/StyleStream](https://github.com/Berkeley-Speech-Group/StyleStream) — ⭐ 47 · `Python` · Paper Code — StyleStream is a system that enables zero-shot voice style conversion, capable of transferring timbre, accent, and emotion, with efficient streaming inference on local hardware like an RTX 4060.
- [kizuna-intelligence/Irodori-TTS-Lite](https://github.com/kizuna-intelligence/Irodori-TTS-Lite) — ⭐ 43 · `Python` · Library — This repository provides an optimized, Int4-quantized inference runtime for the Faster-Irodori-TTS2 voice-design model, enabling efficient text-to-speech generation with a significantly reduced VRAM requirement of approximately 1GB.
- [supertone-inc/supertonic-py](https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic-py) — ⭐ 39 · `Python` · Library — This is a lightning-fast, on-device Text-to-Speech (TTS) library built with ONNX, designed to run efficiently on CPU without needing a GPU. It supports 31 languages, enabling expressive speech generation natively across various platforms.
- [cwx-worst-one/WavTTS](https://github.com/cwx-worst-one/WavTTS) — ⭐ 28 · `Python` · Paper Code — WavTTS is a Zero-Shot Text-to-Speech (TTS) model from ByteDance that generates high-quality speech and performs high-fidelity voice cloning by directly modeling raw waveforms, ideal for personalized AI assistants and professional voiceovers.
- [rednote-hilab/dots.tts](https://github.com/rednote-hilab/dots.tts) — ⭐ 25 · `Python` · Library — dots.tts is a multilingual Text-to-Speech (TTS) system that features 2 billion parameters and can synthesize high-quality speech at 48kHz, including support for languages like Japanese.
- [AgoraIO/skills](https://github.com/AgoraIO/skills) — ⭐ 24 · `Shell` · Library — This repository provides components and tools for rapidly building real-time, interruptible conversational AI and voice agents. It enables multi-turn, intelligent voice interactions and is designed to work with various AI coding assistants.
- [vexyl-ai/vexyl-tts](https://github.com/vexyl-ai/vexyl-tts) — ⭐ 24 · `Python` · Self-hosted Service — An open-source text-to-speech server that generates speech in 22 Indian languages with 44 speakers, offering both WebSocket and REST APIs. It wraps the ai4bharat/indic-parler-tts model.
- [netease-youdao/Confucius4-TTS](https://github.com/netease-youdao/Confucius4-TTS) — ⭐ 19 · Library — This repository provides the Confucius4 Text-to-Speech (TTS) model, allowing users to synthesize speech from text, potentially in foreign languages. It likely includes code for running the model and may support voice cloning capabilities.
- [smallest-inc/cookbook](https://github.com/smallest-inc/cookbook) — ⭐ 19 · `Python` · Tutorial/Course — This 'cookbook' provides examples and guides for integrating and utilizing the Smallest AI platform, specifically showcasing implementations and use cases for voice agents with LiveKit.
- [MisoLabsAI/MisoTTS](https://github.com/MisoLabsAI/MisoTTS) — ⭐ 17 · `Python` · Model Weights — Miso TTS is an 8 billion-parameter text-to-speech model designed to generate highly emotive speech from text.
- [lifeiteng/OmniVAD-Kit](https://github.com/lifeiteng/OmniVAD-Kit) — ⭐ 14 · `Python` · Library — This is a cross-platform toolkit for Voice Activity Detection (VAD) and Audio Event Detection, offering APIs for Python, TypeScript, and C. It features compact DFSMN models and provides high-performance operation across diverse environments, including native applications, browsers via WebAssembly, and Node.js.
- [anzy-renlab-ai/pronounce](https://github.com/anzy-renlab-ai/pronounce) — ⭐ 11 · `Shell` · Application — This repository provides a set of tools to help developers pronounce technical jargon correctly, featuring a dictionary of over 1,650 terms. It includes a Bash CLI, a VS Code extension, an interactive quiz, voice search functionality, and integrates as an MCP server with a Claude Code skill.

## Music

Generate melodies, beats, and full arrangements from text or a few seed notes

<details>
<summary>Show 13 repos</summary>

- [multimodal-art-projection/YuE](https://github.com/multimodal-art-projection/YuE) — ⭐ 6,214 · `Python` · Library — YuE is an open-source foundation model for full-song music generation, similar to Suno.ai. It can generate complete songs, including vocals and instruments, from text prompts.
- [ace-step/ACE-Step](https://github.com/ace-step/ACE-Step) — ⭐ 4,468 · `Python` · Application — ACE-Step is an open-source foundation model for music generation, offering fast, high-quality audio production, voice cloning, lyrics editing, and mixing capabilities across multiple languages and styles.
- [fspecii/ace-step-ui](https://github.com/fspecii/ace-step-ui) — ⭐ 2,949 · `JavaScript` · Application — This repository offers a professional user interface for ACE-Step 1.5, an open-source AI music generation system, serving as a free and local alternative to Suno. It enables users to generate music without cloud dependencies.
- [gcui-art/suno-api](https://github.com/gcui-art/suno-api) — ⭐ 2,938 · `TypeScript` · Library — This project provides an API client for suno.ai, enabling programmatic access to its music generation AI. It is designed for easy integration into other AI agents, such as GPTs.
- [magenta/magenta-realtime](https://github.com/magenta/magenta-realtime) — ⭐ 1,090 · `Python` · Library — This repository contains the codebase for Magenta RealTime 2, an open-weights live music generation model designed for real-time applications and plugins.
- [dada-bots/underfit](https://github.com/dada-bots/underfit) — ⭐ 24 · `Python` · Application — Underfit is a tool for training LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) models specifically for Stable Audio, enabling users to fine-tune the model with their own data to create custom musical compositions.
- [moiseshorta/CoDiCodec-Flow](https://github.com/moiseshorta/CoDiCodec-Flow) — ⭐ 23 · `Python` · Library — CoDiCodec-Flow is a Python repository that provides a real-time neural audio synthesis model, allowing users to train their own audio generation models using Flow Matching DiT on CoDiCodec latents with relatively small datasets.
- [Stability-AI/stable-audio-3](https://github.com/Stability-AI/stable-audio-3) — ⭐ 23 · `Python` · Model Weights — This repository contains Stable Audio 3, a family of open-weight models designed for generating instrumental music and sound effects. These models are engineered for speed, offer editing capabilities, and are trained on a diverse dataset of licensed and Creative Commons audio.
- [fundwotsai2001/MIDI-SAG](https://github.com/fundwotsai2001/MIDI-SAG) — ⭐ 21 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project contains the official code for "MIDI-Informed Singing Accompaniment Generation in a Compositional Song Pipeline," aiming to generate musical accompaniment based on MIDI input.
- [Khala-Music-AI/Khala](https://github.com/Khala-Music-AI/Khala) — ⭐ 20 · `Python` · Paper Code — Khala is an open-source music generation model developed by the Central Conservatory of Music in Beijing. It includes the research paper, code, model weights, and a demo, providing a comprehensive resource for music synthesis.
- [betweentwomidnights/gary4juce](https://github.com/betweentwomidnights/gary4juce) — ⭐ 19 · `C++` · Plugin/Extension — This repository integrates seven open-source AI music generation and production models directly into Digital Audio Workstations (DAWs), allowing users to leverage AI for music creation within their production environment. It aims to provide local backend support for both PC and Mac users.
- [daydreamlive/DEMON](https://github.com/daydreamlive/DEMON) — ⭐ 16 · `Python` · Library — DEMON (Diffusion Engine for Musical Orchestrated Noise) is a Python-based diffusion engine for generating music or audio, potentially leveraging advanced models like LoRA and VAEs.
- [ZacharyNovack/live-music-diffusion-models](https://github.com/ZacharyNovack/live-music-diffusion-models) — ⭐ 10 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the code and resources for a research project on live music diffusion models, accompanying a scientific paper and a public demo.

</details>

## Voice Cloning

Capture a voice from seconds of audio and make it say anything

- [myshell-ai/OpenVoice](https://github.com/myshell-ai/OpenVoice) — ⭐ 36,586 · `Python` · Library — OpenVoice is an audio foundation model from MIT and MyShell that provides instant voice cloning and zero-shot Text-to-Speech (TTS) capabilities. It allows for quick and accurate replication of voices with minimal data.
- [RVC-Project/Retrieval-based-Voice-Conversion-WebUI](https://github.com/RVC-Project/Retrieval-based-Voice-Conversion-WebUI) — ⭐ 35,792 · `Python` · Application — This project offers a Web UI to easily train high-quality voice conversion (VC) models using retrieval-based methods. It allows users to create custom voice models quickly, often in under 10 minutes.
- [jamiepine/voicebox](https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox) — ⭐ 24,667 · `TypeScript` · Application — Voicebox is an open-source AI voice studio that utilizes AI models such as Qwen3-TTS and Whisper for advanced voice capabilities. It enables users to clone voices, dictate text, and easily create new audio content.
- [QwenLM/Qwen3-TTS](https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-TTS) — ⭐ 11,907 · `Python` · Model Weights — Qwen3-TTS is an open-source series of Text-to-Speech (TTS) models developed by Alibaba Cloud, offering stable, expressive, and streaming speech generation. It supports free-form voice design and vivid voice cloning, controllable with natural language.
- [k2-fsa/OmniVoice](https://github.com/k2-fsa/OmniVoice) — ⭐ 4,705 · `Python` · Library — OmniVoice is a project for high-quality voice cloning and text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis, supporting over 600 languages to convert text into natural-sounding spoken audio.
- [ysharma3501/LuxTTS](https://github.com/ysharma3501/LuxTTS) — ⭐ 4,011 · `Python` · Library — LuxTTS is a high-quality, rapid voice cloning model capable of synthesizing voices at 150x real-time speed. It operates efficiently on both GPU and CPU, requiring minimal VRAM (as low as 1GB) and can clone voices from just 3 seconds of audio, producing 48khz output.
- [Finrandojin/alexandria-audiobook](https://github.com/Finrandojin/alexandria-audiobook) — ⭐ 594 · `Python` · Application — This is an AI-powered tool for generating multi-voice audiobooks. It uses an LLM for script annotation, allows for voice cloning and design, offers per-line style control, and can export to various audio formats including chaptered M4B.
- [debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio) — ⭐ 531 · `Python` · Self-hosted Service — OmniVoice-Studio is an open-source, self-hosted alternative to ElevenLabs, providing local voice cloning, design, creation, and cinematic video dubbing with real-time dictation across many languages.
- [sunnyxrxrx/X-Voice](https://github.com/sunnyxrxrx/X-Voice) — ⭐ 51 · `Python` · Application — X-Voice is a multilingual Text-to-Speech (TTS) system that enables zero-shot cross-lingual voice cloning, allowing a single speaker's voice to be used across 30 different languages. It provides the necessary codes and resources for this advanced audio synthesis capability.
- [ScenemaAI/scenema-audio](https://github.com/ScenemaAI/scenema-audio) — ⭐ 31 · `Python` · Application — Scenema Audio is an open-source tool for zero-shot expressive voice cloning and speech generation, capable of producing audio from short clips to full-length audiobooks with realistic emotions, pacing, and breath control, and cloning voices from a 10-second reference.

## Source Separation

Split any mix into clean vocal, drum, and instrument stems

- [0x0funky/audioghost-ai](https://github.com/0x0funky/audioghost-ai) — ⭐ 389 · `TypeScript` · Application — AudioGhost AI extracts specific sounds or audio objects from audio using natural language text prompts, leveraging a memory-optimized SAM-Audio model and a modern UI.
- [thcp/stemdeck](https://github.com/thcp/stemdeck) — ⭐ 14 · `JavaScript` · Application — Stemdeck is a YouTube stem video extractor designed for music practice and other related uses. It allows users to isolate individual musical stems from YouTube videos.

## Effects

Neural reverb, denoising, and mastering that polish audio in real time

- [intel/openvino-plugins-ai-audacity](https://github.com/intel/openvino-plugins-ai-audacity) — ⭐ 1,966 · `C++` · Plugin/Extension — A collection of AI-enabled effects, generators, and analyzers designed as plugins for the Audacity® audio editor.
- [oyama/pico-neural-amp-modeler-demo](https://github.com/oyama/pico-neural-amp-modeler-demo) — ⭐ 13 · `C` · Application — This project demonstrates the real-time inference of the Neural Amp Modeler (NAM A2-Lite) on a Raspberry Pi Pico 2 (RP2350). It functions as a driverless USB audio device, showcasing how a neural network can process audio on embedded hardware.
- [SGUN-father/comfyui-controlfoley](https://github.com/SGUN-father/comfyui-controlfoley) — ⭐ 12 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — ComfyUI-ControlFoley is an integration for ComfyUI that generates synchronized foley sound effects from various inputs including video, images, and text prompts.

## Transcription

Fast, accurate speech-to-text with diarization across dozens of languages

- [ggml-org/whisper.cpp](https://github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp) — ⭐ 50,276 · `C++` · Library — This project is a high-performance C/C++ port of OpenAI's Whisper model, optimized for efficient inference of speech recognition and speech-to-text tasks. It enables running the Whisper model on various platforms with native C/C++ speed.
- [SYSTRAN/faster-whisper](https://github.com/SYSTRAN/faster-whisper) — ⭐ 23,256 · `Python` · Library — Faster Whisper provides an optimized implementation for Whisper transcription, leveraging CTranslate2 for improved inference performance and quantization. It aims to accelerate speech-to-text processing compared to the original Whisper model.
- [m-bain/whisperX](https://github.com/m-bain/whisperX) — ⭐ 22,404 · `Python` · Library — WhisperX is an automatic speech recognition (ASR) tool that transcribes audio with word-level timestamps and also performs speaker diarization, doing so at high speeds.
- [modelscope/FunASR](https://github.com/modelscope/FunASR) — ⭐ 18,071 · `Python` · MCP Server — FunASR is an industrial-grade toolkit for speech recognition, offering high-speed transcription (up to 170x realtime), speaker diarization, emotion detection, and support for over 50 languages and dialects. - [QuentinFuxa/WhisperLiveKit](https://github.com/QuentinFuxa/WhisperLiveKit) — ⭐ 10,359 · `Python` · Self-hosted Service — A self-hosted tool for simultaneous speech-to-text transcription, offering live translation and speaker diarization capabilities.

- [OpenWhispr/openwhispr](https://github.com/OpenWhispr/openwhispr) — ⭐ 3,746 · `TypeScript` · Application — OpenWhispr is a privacy-first, cross-platform voice-to-text dictation application that supports both local models (like Nvidia Parakeet/Whisper) and cloud models via Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) for transcription.
- [SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator](https://github.com/SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator) — ⭐ 2,964 · `C#` · Application — This Windows application provides real-time speech translation by utilizing Windows LiveCaptions to convert live audio into translated text.

- [rishikanthc/Scriberr](https://github.com/rishikanthc/Scriberr) — ⭐ 2,742 · `Go` · Self-hosted Service — Scriberr is a self-hosted AI-powered tool designed for transcribing audio into text. It allows users to convert spoken content from audio files offline.

- [hehehai/voxt](https://github.com/hehehai/voxt) — ⭐ 579 · `Swift` · Application — Voxt is a macOS application that offers voice input and translation, enabling users to speak, transcribe speech into text, and translate it for quick text entry or meeting notes.

- [Gremble-io/tome-app](https://github.com/Gremble-io/tome-app) — ⭐ 406 · `Swift` · Application — A Swift application for macOS that performs local, private meeting transcription directly into an Obsidian vault. It operates entirely offline, requiring no cloud services or API keys.
- [karansinghgit/speaktype](https://github.com/karansinghgit/speaktype) — ⭐ 299 · `Swift` · Application — SpeakType is an open-source and 100% offline voice dictation application for macOS, enabling users to convert spoken words into text directly on their device without internet connectivity.
- [xzf-thu/Mega-ASR](https://github.com/xzf-thu/Mega-ASR) — ⭐ 220 · `Python` · Library — Mega-ASR is a robust, open-source Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system designed to excel in challenging real-world audio conditions, such as noise, reverberation, and distortions, where other ASR models often fail. It's built upon Qwen3-ASR and addresses limitations of existing models like Whisper in handling 'bad audio.'

- [muscriptor/muscriptor](https://github.com/muscriptor/muscriptor) — ⭐ 176 · `Python` · Model Weights — MuScriptor is an open-weight, decoder-only Transformer model for multi-instrument music transcription, developed by Kyutai and Mirelo, specifically trained on real recordings.

It features optimized typesetting rules for multiple languages, including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and English.

It automates the process of transcribing audio and video for various uses like podcasts, interviews, and meetings.

It aims to provide more robust forced alignment compared to tools like Whisper, handling durations up to several hours.

It's designed to help users manage meeting tasks by converting spoken language into actionable items.

It also offers optional AI refinement using existing user subscriptions without additional cost.

- [umutcetinkaya/live-translator](https://github.com/umutcetinkaya/live-translator) — ⭐ 15 · `Python` · Application — Live Translator is a macOS application that provides real-time translation of any system audio, such as from YouTube videos, podcasts, or meetings. ## Other

Sound event detection, audio fingerprinting, and niche tools the pros reach for

<details>
<summary>Show 14 repos</summary>

- [hanxi/xiaomusic](https://github.com/hanxi/xiaomusic) — ⭐ 9,925 · `Python` · Application — This project transforms Xiaomi Xiaoai smart speakers into a more versatile local and network music player. It allows users to play music, manage playlists, and search/download songs via voice commands, bypassing common copyright and membership restrictions.
- [abus-aikorea/voice-pro](https://github.com/abus-aikorea/voice-pro) — ⭐ 8,662 · `Python` · Application — Voice-Pro is a Gradio WebUI offering a comprehensive suite of audio tools for creators. It includes various text-to-speech engines, zero-shot voice cloning, Whisper-based audio processing, vocal isolation, YouTube downloads, and multilingual translation capabilities.
- [MrsEWE44/musicDownload](https://github.com/MrsEWE44/musicDownload) — ⭐ 1,511 · `Python` · CLI Tool — This repository provides tools for downloading music.
- [wozniakpawel/PairPods](https://github.com/wozniakpawel/PairPods) — ⭐ 546 · `Swift` · Application — PairPods is a free, open-source macOS application that enables users to simultaneously share system audio across multiple Bluetooth devices. It allows outputting audio to several headphones or speakers at once.
- [OpenMOSS/MOSS-Audio](https://github.com/OpenMOSS/MOSS-Audio) — ⭐ 432 · `Python` · Model Weights — MOSS-Audio is an open-source foundation model for unified audio understanding, capable of handling speech, sound, music, captioning, QA, and reasoning tasks in various real-world scenarios.
- [Deep-unlearning/smol-audio](https://github.com/Deep-unlearning/smol-audio) — ⭐ 398 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Tutorial/Course — This repository provides practical, Google Colab-friendly Jupyter notebooks designed for fine-tuning and running various audio AI models.
- [peternaame-boop/ytm-player](https://github.com/peternaame-boop/ytm-player) — ⭐ 381 · `Python` · Application — This is a terminal-based YouTube Music player. It features vim keybindings, synced lyrics, and cross-platform media key support, providing a command-line interface for music playback.
- [OpenVoiceOS/ovos-installer](https://github.com/OpenVoiceOS/ovos-installer) — ⭐ 281 · `Shell` · CLI Tool — This is an installer that automates the setup of Open Voice OS and/or HiveMind on Linux and macOS, featuring a user-friendly text-based interface.
- [marcomorosi06/WiFiAudioStreaming-Desktop](https://github.com/marcomorosi06/WiFiAudioStreaming-Desktop) — ⭐ 179 · `Kotlin` · Application — This desktop application, built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, enables streaming a computer's internal audio wirelessly over a local network. It effectively turns a PC into a wireless audio transmitter.
- [TrevTron/rtl-ml](https://github.com/TrevTron/rtl-ml) — ⭐ 156 · `Python` · Application — This project is an AI-powered radio signal classifier that uses RTL-SDR hardware to identify various radio signals with high accuracy. It provides a complete pipeline for signal capture, training, and classification, designed to run on low-cost ARM single-board computers.
- [omni2sound/Omni2Sound](https://github.com/omni2sound/Omni2Sound) — ⭐ 127 · `Python` · Paper Code — Omni2Sound is a multimodal audio generation codebase that allows a single model to generate high-quality audio from video, text, or a combination of both, without compromising performance across different input modalities. It utilizes a novel dataset called SoundAtlas and a three-stage training schedule to resolve task conflicts.
- [xzf-thu/Audio-Interaction](https://github.com/xzf-thu/Audio-Interaction) — ⭐ 63 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the Python code implementation accompanying a research paper on "Audio Interaction." It likely includes the model and related code to work with a large audio dataset, focusing on processing and understanding audio for interactive systems.
- [ddlBoJack/MMAE](https://github.com/ddlBoJack/MMAE) — ⭐ 45 · `Python` · Dataset — MMAE is presented as a massive multitask audio editing benchmark, designed for the comprehensive evaluation of AI models in speech and general audio editing.
- [austenstone/myinstants-mcp](https://github.com/austenstone/myinstants-mcp) — ⭐ 10 · `JavaScript` · MCP Server — An MCP server that allows AI agents to press sound buttons from a soundboard. It's designed to provide real-time audio feedback, for example, by playing specific sounds in response to code analysis or bug detection.

</details>
